name: Retro Windows
description: Win9x desktop OS chrome — warm-grey button-face panels, navy title bars and headlines, white sunken content wells, hard rectangular bevels, a system-sans UI voice + a VT323 CRT-terminal accent.
descriptionZh: Win9x 桌面系统界面——暖灰按钮面板、深蓝标题栏与标题、白色内容区、硬边框浮雕，系统无衬线 + VT323 终端字体。
bestFor: Retro / technical / systems talks — the visual language of 1990s desktop software (CLI tools, dev tooling, nostalgia).
